---
author: My name
short: My topic
title: A long description of my topic
institute: University of Iowa
venue: Conference ABC
date: 2025-01-01
date-format: long
latex-auto-install: false
format:
  beamer:
    incremental: true
    slide-level: 3
    template: ../../templates/slides.tex
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    fig-align: center
    echo: true
---

# My section

## My subsection

### Introduction

* Interesting point number 1
* Interesting point number 2
* Interesting point number 3
  $$ \y = \X \bb + \bvep $$
  $$ \oI = \oV^{-1} = \fI = \fV^{-1} $$

### Here's some code and a plot

```{r}
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-width: 6
#| out-width: 80%
rnorm(3)
curve(sin, -pi, pi, bty = "n", las = 1)
```
